## Checklist

- [ ] CLA signed in the [main repository](https://github.com/Mi-Bee-Studio/MiBeeSteward/blob/main/CLA.md) (one-time)
- [ ] All commits carry `Signed-off-by` ([DCO](https://github.com/Mi-Bee-Studio/MiBeeSteward/blob/main/.github/DCO.md))
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] If changing fingerprint YAMLs: provenance is CC-BY-SA-4.0-compatible (no nmap NPSL data)
